name: NovaKur Fashion Theme
shortDescription: Bold editorial OpenCart 4 theme for fashion, clothing, and lifestyle stores. Full-bleed imagery, magazine-style grid.
description: NovaKur Fashion brings a ZARA/H&M-level editorial experience to OpenCart 4. Features a lookbook grid, full-bleed hero banners, product card image swap on hover, color swatches, size selector with availability, and an Instagram-style photo grid section. Built for clothing and lifestyle stores that need a fashion-forward presence.
features: Product card image swap on hover
Mobile sticky Add to Cart bar
